item.title: 本影片全部由AI生成！OpenAI 公布 Sora 最新文生视频功能，我可能要失业了... | 零度解说
item.itunes:title: 本影片全部由AI生成！OpenAI 公布 Sora 最新文生视频功能，我可能要失业了... | 零度解说
item.itunes:author: 零度解说
item.itunes:summary:
[Music]. well they say everyone has something. unique about them something that SS them. apart since in my case you know it's. quite obvious what that thing. is I am literally filled with Mod air. yeah living like this has its challenges. uh windy days for one could be. Troublesome or there was the one time my. girlfriend insisted I go to the cactus. store to get my wedding. present what do I love most about my. predicament through the perspective it. gives me I get to see the world. differently I float above the mundane. and the ordinary I see things a.

different way from everyone else yeah I. feel like it's because of that. perspective I'm reminded every day that. life is fragile we're all just a pin. prick away from deflation so I try to. live life. lightness me when you wake. [Music]. up. days it has to be a way. [Music]. out. [Music]. welcome to beyond our reality a journey. through parallel worlds where we delve. into the.

extraordinary episode 1 unveils the. giraffe flamingo a stunning hybrid that. roams the Savannah with Grace and. vibrant Hues in episode 2 we Ascend with. the flying pigs Charming creatures that. redefine the skies with their harmonious. F episode 3 plunges us Into the Depths. to discover the whale pus An Elegant. blend of whale and octopus ruling the. ocean. Abyss episode 4 introduces us to the e. cat an aquatic Enigma that combines the. sleekness of an eel with the Curiosity. of a cat episode 5 presents the bunny. armadillo a delightful mix of bunny. charm and armadillo protection.

captivating our. parts episode 6 features the horse fly a. small yet Noble creature that buzzes. with a blend of horse-like dignity and. fly-like. Agility episode 7 explores The Reptilian. Aro a creature that leaps across the. desert with the Vigor of a kangar the. and the resilience of a. reptile our adventure culminates in. episode 8 with the fox Crow a fusion of. fox cunning and Crow Freedom soaring. through the forest. Enigma join us on this mesmerizing. journey through beyond our reality a. journey through parallel worlds where.

the marvels of the unknown. [Music]. beckon. [Music]. a. [Music]. a. [Music]. show. [Music]. [Music]. n. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short the P of. me that's yours.

[Music]. always love is. [Music]. cover wake. up not enough then. you. days even know our time short piece of. me. [Music]. yours. covers wake up. not enough then. you. [Music]. days I feel like you're hostage now your. L done under covers you love me when you.

wake up is me or am I not enough then. you leave and I'm Hollow some days I get. so low it has to be a way. out. [Music]. [Applause]. [Music]. he. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. for. [Music]. [Music]. for I don't change know cuz I like CU I. let to be myself if you're not agree you.

can walk away you can walk away you can. walk away.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U5JO6z62e6Y

【更多资源】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w?sub_confirmation=1

item.description:
[Music]. well they say everyone has something. unique about them something that SS them. apart since in my case you know it's. quite obvious what that thing. is I am literally filled with Mod air. yeah living like this has its challenges. uh windy days for one could be. Troublesome or there was the one time my. girlfriend insisted I go to the cactus. store to get my wedding. present what do I love most about my. predicament through the perspective it. gives me I get to see the world. differently I float above the mundane. and the ordinary I see things a.

different way from everyone else yeah I. feel like it's because of that. perspective I'm reminded every day that. life is fragile we're all just a pin. prick away from deflation so I try to. live life. lightness me when you wake. [Music]. up. days it has to be a way. [Music]. out. [Music]. welcome to beyond our reality a journey. through parallel worlds where we delve. into the.

extraordinary episode 1 unveils the. giraffe flamingo a stunning hybrid that. roams the Savannah with Grace and. vibrant Hues in episode 2 we Ascend with. the flying pigs Charming creatures that. redefine the skies with their harmonious. F episode 3 plunges us Into the Depths. to discover the whale pus An Elegant. blend of whale and octopus ruling the. ocean. Abyss episode 4 introduces us to the e. cat an aquatic Enigma that combines the. sleekness of an eel with the Curiosity. of a cat episode 5 presents the bunny. armadillo a delightful mix of bunny. charm and armadillo protection.

captivating our. parts episode 6 features the horse fly a. small yet Noble creature that buzzes. with a blend of horse-like dignity and. fly-like. Agility episode 7 explores The Reptilian. Aro a creature that leaps across the. desert with the Vigor of a kangar the. and the resilience of a. reptile our adventure culminates in. episode 8 with the fox Crow a fusion of. fox cunning and Crow Freedom soaring. through the forest. Enigma join us on this mesmerizing. journey through beyond our reality a. journey through parallel worlds where.

the marvels of the unknown. [Music]. beckon. [Music]. a. [Music]. a. [Music]. show. [Music]. [Music]. n. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short the P of. me that's yours.

[Music]. always love is. [Music]. cover wake. up not enough then. you. days even know our time short piece of. me. [Music]. yours. covers wake up. not enough then. you. [Music]. days I feel like you're hostage now your. L done under covers you love me when you.

wake up is me or am I not enough then. you leave and I'm Hollow some days I get. so low it has to be a way. out. [Music]. [Applause]. [Music]. he. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. for. [Music]. [Music]. for I don't change know cuz I like CU I. let to be myself if you're not agree you.

can walk away you can walk away you can. walk away.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U5JO6z62e6Y

item.content:encoded:
[Music]. well they say everyone has something. unique about them something that SS them. apart since in my case you know it's. quite obvious what that thing. is I am literally filled with Mod air. yeah living like this has its challenges. uh windy days for one could be. Troublesome or there was the one time my. girlfriend insisted I go to the cactus. store to get my wedding. present what do I love most about my. predicament through the perspective it. gives me I get to see the world. differently I float above the mundane. and the ordinary I see things a.

different way from everyone else yeah I. feel like it's because of that. perspective I'm reminded every day that. life is fragile we're all just a pin. prick away from deflation so I try to. live life. lightness me when you wake. [Music]. up. days it has to be a way. [Music]. out. [Music]. welcome to beyond our reality a journey. through parallel worlds where we delve. into the.

extraordinary episode 1 unveils the. giraffe flamingo a stunning hybrid that. roams the Savannah with Grace and. vibrant Hues in episode 2 we Ascend with. the flying pigs Charming creatures that. redefine the skies with their harmonious. F episode 3 plunges us Into the Depths. to discover the whale pus An Elegant. blend of whale and octopus ruling the. ocean. Abyss episode 4 introduces us to the e. cat an aquatic Enigma that combines the. sleekness of an eel with the Curiosity. of a cat episode 5 presents the bunny. armadillo a delightful mix of bunny. charm and armadillo protection.

captivating our. parts episode 6 features the horse fly a. small yet Noble creature that buzzes. with a blend of horse-like dignity and. fly-like. Agility episode 7 explores The Reptilian. Aro a creature that leaps across the. desert with the Vigor of a kangar the. and the resilience of a. reptile our adventure culminates in. episode 8 with the fox Crow a fusion of. fox cunning and Crow Freedom soaring. through the forest. Enigma join us on this mesmerizing. journey through beyond our reality a. journey through parallel worlds where.

the marvels of the unknown. [Music]. beckon. [Music]. a. [Music]. a. [Music]. show. [Music]. [Music]. n. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short the P of. me that's yours.

[Music]. always love is. [Music]. cover wake. up not enough then. you. days even know our time short piece of. me. [Music]. yours. covers wake up. not enough then. you. [Music]. days I feel like you're hostage now your. L done under covers you love me when you.

wake up is me or am I not enough then. you leave and I'm Hollow some days I get. so low it has to be a way. out. [Music]. [Applause]. [Music]. he. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. for. [Music]. [Music]. for I don't change know cuz I like CU I. let to be myself if you're not agree you.
